response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (~13+ years) with TDD, CI/CD, and polyglot skills, but lacks the core mandatory requirements: no substantial C++ experience on Windows (only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. Primary stack is JS/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not aligned with the role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Polyglot engineer with experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Minimal C++ experience — only ~6 months at National Instruments, far below the 5–10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
